name: SafeClaw — Containerized Execution
description: Routes OpenClaw tool execution through Validance containers. Host is never touched.

gatewayHost.description: Host/IP for approval webhook URL as seen from the Validance container (e.g. Docker bridge IP)

catalogOverlayPath.description: Optional absolute path to a catalog overlay JSON file. Templates in the overlay are merged into the bundled default catalog (overlay wins on key collision). Used by operators to add deployment-specific tools without modifying the published plugin. Falls back to the SAFECLAW_CATALOG_OVERLAY env var if unset.
